reviews.review_description: Yo shockwave interactive y’all should definitely add a monster, cause almost all horror games i try to play are only gorilla tag movement, and I want a game that I have to sway my arms around just to run away from a monster, so please devs add a monster it will make the game 10x better.
I walked alllll the way down the corridor just for there to be nothing, biggest f u ever, but the game is great although foesnt feel creepy

I love backrooms games. When I saw this on tiktok, I had to try it. When I got the game and played it for a bit, I was majorly disappointed. I know that the game is in "Early Access" but come on, that alone isn't a excuse on why someone would wanna "release" their game when there's barely nothing to do in the game. Why release a game when it barely has anything to do in? The game is a basic walking simulator. Only has two levels. Your hands IRL don't match with your in-game hands (PLEASE FIX THAT)! The IK doesn't function, there was a basic lack of guidance on how to do anything. The performance is horrible even on a Quest 3. I would recommend pulling the game from the Meta Store and keep working on it more and more until there is content like multiple levels (not just 2), sanity system and more. As of now, I don't recommend this game.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for your review. I mainly released this just for ease of testing and so that I would have more of a reason to work on it if it was actually released. I never expected this game to get nearly as much attention as it did, so I only expected around ten people to download the game and play it. And yes, as of right now it is just a simple walking simulator with 2 small levels, and I'm sorry about that. In the next update coming out in a week or two there will be much more stuff to do, and 3 or 4 more levels, as well as making the current levels much larger, a climbing system, performance updates, and a sanity system. Again, I'm sorry for the lack of content but I thought only ten people would play this game, not 1000. Hope this clears some stuff up.
